requirement_topic.en: Connector Incompatibility — IEC 62196 (Sri Lanka) vs GB/T 20234 (China)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口不兼容——IEC 62196（斯里兰卡）与GB/T 20234（中国）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口不兼容——IEC 62196（斯里蘭卡）與GB/T 20234（中國）

summary.en: Sri Lanka EV vehicle imports are dominated by Japanese and European-origin vehicles using IEC 62196-2 (Type 1 / Type 2 AC connector) and IEC 62196-3 (CCS or CHAdeMO DC connector) standards. Sri Lanka does not adopt the Chinese GB/T 20234 connector standard. IEC 62196 connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with GB/T 20234 connectors; a charger designed for GB/T 20234 vehicles cannot charge IEC 62196-standard vehicles without a separate adapter, and such adapters are not always technically safe or commercially available in Sri Lanka.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡进口电动汽车以日本和欧洲原产车辆为主，采用IEC 62196-2（1型/2型交流接口）和IEC 62196-3（CCS或CHAdeMO直流接口）标准。斯里兰卡不采用中国GB/T 20234接口标准。IEC 62196接口与GB/T 20234接口在物理和电气上不兼容；为GB/T 20234车辆设计的充电设备无法在无独立适配器的情况下为IEC 62196标准车辆充电，且此类适配器在斯里兰卡不一定在技术上安全或可商业采购。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡進口電動汽車以日本和歐洲原產車輛為主，採用IEC 62196-2（1型/2型交流接口）和IEC 62196-3（CCS或CHAdeMO直流接口）標準。斯里蘭卡不採用中國GB/T 20234接口標準。IEC 62196接口與GB/T 20234接口在物理和電氣上不兼容；為GB/T 20234車輛設計的充電設備無法在無獨立適配器的情況下為IEC 62196標準車輛充電，且此類適配器在斯里蘭卡不一定在技術上安全或可商業採購。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2: Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — AC pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 1 and Type 2)
IEC 62196-3: Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube accessories (CCS, CHAdeMO)
GB/T 20234.1-2015, GB/T 20234.2-2015, GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Chinese EV connector standards (not applicable in Sri Lanka)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.1 (general requirements), GB/T 20234.2 (AC charging interface), and GB/T 20234.3 (DC charging interface) as the mandatory connector standards for domestic Chinese EV charging equipment. These connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 1/Type 2 AC and CCS/CHAdeMO DC connectors used in Sri Lanka-market vehicles.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 20234.1（通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2（交流充电接口）和GB/T 20234.3（直流充电接口）作为国内电动汽车充电设备的强制接口标准。这些接口与斯里兰卡市场车辆所用的IEC 62196 1型/2型交流和CCS/CHAdeMO直流接口在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 20234.1（通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2（交流充電接口）和GB/T 20234.3（直流充電接口）作為國內電動汽車充電設備的強制接口標準。這些接口與斯里蘭卡市場車輛所用的IEC 62196 1型/2型交流和CCS/CHAdeMO直流接口在物理上不兼容。

gap.en: This is the most critical gap for China-origin EV chargers entering Sri Lanka. China-specification EV chargers with GB/T 20234 connectors cannot serve the existing Sri Lanka EV fleet, which is predominantly IEC 62196-based. Exporters must supply chargers equipped with IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 AC) and/or IEC 62196-3 (CCS2 or CHAdeMO DC) connectors. Charger firmware, communication protocol (IEC 61851 PWM or ISO 15118), and protection logic must also be configured for IEC 62196 operation, not GB/T 20234 operation.
gap.zh: 这是中国原产电动汽车充电设备进入斯里兰卡市场最关键的差距。配备GB/T 20234接口的中国规格电动汽车充电设备无法为现有斯里兰卡电动汽车（主要为IEC 62196标准）充电。出口商须提供配备IEC 62196-2（2型交流）和/或IEC 62196-3（CCS2或CHAdeMO直流）接口的充电设备。充电设备固件、通信协议（IEC 61851 PWM或ISO 15118）和保护逻辑也须配置为IEC 62196运行，而非GB/T 20234运行。
gap.zht: 這是中國原產電動汽車充電設備進入斯里蘭卡市場最關鍵的差距。配備GB/T 20234接口的中國規格電動汽車充電設備無法為現有斯里蘭卡電動汽車（主要為IEC 62196標準）充電。出口商須提供配備IEC 62196-2（2型交流）和/或IEC 62196-3（CCS2或CHAdeMO直流）接口的充電設備。充電設備韌體、通信協議（IEC 61851 PWM或ISO 15118）和保護邏輯也須配置為IEC 62196運行，而非GB/T 20234運行。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62196 connector compatibility is a practical market necessity for Sri Lanka deployment — chargers with GB/T 20234 connectors only are not usable on Sri Lanka's existing EV fleet
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China — GB/T 20234 is the compulsory domestic connector standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China-specification GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicles prevalent in Sri Lanka. EV chargers exported to Sri Lanka must be equipped with IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 AC) and/or IEC 62196-3 (CCS or CHAdeMO DC) connectors; GB/T 20234-only units cannot be commercially deployed on the Sri Lanka EV fleet.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国规格GB/T 20234接口与斯里兰卡主流IEC 62196车辆存在物理不兼容。出口至斯里兰卡的电动汽车充电设备须配备IEC 62196-2（2型交流）和/或IEC 62196-3（CCS或CHAdeMO直流）接口；仅配GB/T 20234接口的产品无法在斯里兰卡电动汽车市场商业部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國規格GB/T 20234接口與斯里蘭卡主流IEC 62196車輛存在物理不兼容。出口至斯里蘭卡的電動汽車充電設備須配備IEC 62196-2（2型交流）和/或IEC 62196-3（CCS或CHAdeMO直流）接口；僅配GB/T 20234接口的產品無法在斯里蘭卡電動汽車市場商業部署。
